value.stringValue:
AND(
DATEVALUE([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01"),
OR( [Lead].Owner:User.Division = "MIR", [Lead].Reseller_Automation__c ),
[Lead].OwnerId <> "005b0000002iwIAAAY", /* Salesforce Admin */
[Lead].OwnerId <> "0056700000Av2XiAAJ", /* ChiliPiper Integration */
NOT(ISBLANK([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c)),
NOT(CONTAINS([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c,"Support")),
NOT(ISPICKVAL([Lead].SW_Fit_Score__c ,"")),
OR( ISPICKVAL([Lead].SW_Fit_Score__c ,"A"), ISPICKVAL([Lead].SW_Fit_Score__c ,"B") ),
OR( [Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c <> [Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c, ISBLANK([Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c) ),
OR( [Lead].Routed__c, NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].LeadSource )) ),
OR( ISCHANGED([Lead].Routed__c), ISCHANGED([Lead].Session_Id__c), ISCHANGED([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c) ),
OR( ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId), NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId)) ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_1
formulas.expression:
AND(
DATEVALUE({!myVariable_current.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}) > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01"),
OR( {!myVariable_current.Owner:User.Division} = "MIR", {!myVariable_current.Reseller_Automation__c} ),
{!myVariable_current.OwnerId} <> "005b0000002iwIAAAY", /* Salesforce Admin */
{!myVariable_current.OwnerId} <> "0056700000Av2XiAAJ", /* ChiliPiper Integration */
NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c})),
NOT(CONTAINS({!myVariable_current.Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c},"Support")),
NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.SW_Fit_Score__c} ,"")),
OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.SW_Fit_Score__c} ,"A"), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.SW_Fit_Score__c} ,"B") ),
OR( {!myVariable_current.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c} <> {!myVariable_current.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}, ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c}) ),
OR( {!myVariable_current.Routed__c}, NOT(ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.LeadSource} )) ),
OR( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Routed__c}), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Session_Id__c}), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}) ),
OR( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.OwnerId}), NOT(ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.OwnerId})) ) )

value.stringValue:
AND(
DATEVALUE([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01"),
[Lead].Owner:User.Division <> "MIR",
[Lead].Owner:User.Division <> "LDR",
[Lead].Reseller_Automation__c = FALSE,
[Lead].OwnerId <>"005b0000002iwIAAAY", /* Salesforce Admin */
[Lead].OwnerId <>"0056700000Av2XiAAJ", /* ChiliPiper Integration */
NOT(ISBLANK([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c)),
NOT(CONTAINS([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c, "Support")),
NOT(ISPICKVAL([Lead].SW_Fit_Score__c,"")),
OR( [Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c <> [Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c, ISBLANK([Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c) ),
OR( [Lead].Routed__c, NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].LeadSource)) ),
OR( ISCHANGED([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c), ISCHANGED([Lead].Session_Id__c), ISCHANGED([Lead].Routed__c) ),
OR( ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId), NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId)) )
)

formulas.name: formula_myRule_13
formulas.expression:
AND(
DATEVALUE({!myVariable_current.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}) > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01"),
{!myVariable_current.Owner:User.Division} <> "MIR",
{!myVariable_current.Owner:User.Division} <> "LDR",
{!myVariable_current.Reseller_Automation__c} = FALSE,
{!myVariable_current.OwnerId} <>"005b0000002iwIAAAY", /* Salesforce Admin */
{!myVariable_current.OwnerId} <>"0056700000Av2XiAAJ", /* ChiliPiper Integration */
NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c})),
NOT(CONTAINS({!myVariable_current.Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c}, "Support")),
NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.SW_Fit_Score__c},"")),
OR( {!myVariable_current.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c} <> {!myVariable_current.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}, ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c}) ),
OR( {!myVariable_current.Routed__c}, NOT(ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.LeadSource})) ),
OR( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Session_Id__c}), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Routed__c}) ),
OR( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.OwnerId}), NOT(ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.OwnerId})) )
)

value.stringValue:
DATEVALUE([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01") && [Lead].OwnerId <> '005b0000002iwIAAAY' && [Lead].Owner:User.Division <> "LDR" && NOT(ISBLANK([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c)) && CONTAINS([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c, "Support") && ( [Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c <> [Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c || ISNULL([Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c) ) && ( [Lead].Routed__c || NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].LeadSource )) )&&
( ISCHANGED([Lead].Routed__c) || ISCHANGED([Lead].Session_Id__c)|| ISCHANGED([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c) )&&
( ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId) || NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId)) )

DATEVALUE([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01") && [Lead].OwnerId <> '005b0000002iwIAAAY' && [Lead].Owner:User.Division <> "LDR" && NOT(ISBLANK([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c)) && CONTAINS([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c, "Support") && ( [Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c <> [Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c || ISNULL([Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c) ) && ( [Lead].Routed__c || NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].LeadSource )) )&&
( ISCHANGED([Lead].Routed__c) || ISCHANGED([Lead].Session_Id__c)|| ISCHANGED([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c) )&&
( ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId) || NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId)) )

AND(
DATEVALUE([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01"),
OR( [Lead].Owner:User.Division = "MIR", [Lead].Reseller_Automation__c ),
[Lead].OwnerId <> "005b0000002iwIAAAY", /* Salesforce Admin */
[Lead].OwnerId <> "0056700000Av2XiAAJ", /* ChiliPiper Integration */
NOT(ISBLANK([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c)),
NOT(CONTAINS([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c,"Support")),
NOT(ISPICKVAL([Lead].SW_Fit_Score__c ,"")),
OR( ISPICKVAL([Lead].SW_Fit_Score__c ,"A"), ISPICKVAL([Lead].SW_Fit_Score__c ,"B") ),
OR( [Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c <> [Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c, ISBLANK([Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c) ),
OR( [Lead].Routed__c, NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].LeadSource )) ),
OR( ISCHANGED([Lead].Routed__c), ISCHANGED([Lead].Session_Id__c), ISCHANGED([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c) ),
OR( ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId), NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId)) ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_1_pmetrule
formulas.expression:
AND(
DATEVALUE({!myVariable_old.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}) > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01"),
OR( {!myVariable_old.Owner:User.Division} = "MIR", {!myVariable_old.Reseller_Automation__c} ),
{!myVariable_old.OwnerId} <> "005b0000002iwIAAAY", /* Salesforce Admin */
{!myVariable_old.OwnerId} <> "0056700000Av2XiAAJ", /* ChiliPiper Integration */
NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_old.Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c})),
NOT(CONTAINS({!myVariable_old.Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c},"Support")),
NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.SW_Fit_Score__c} ,"")),
OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.SW_Fit_Score__c} ,"A"), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.SW_Fit_Score__c} ,"B") ),
OR( {!myVariable_old.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c} <> {!myVariable_old.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}, ISBLANK({!myVariable_old.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c}) ),
OR( {!myVariable_old.Routed__c}, NOT(ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.LeadSource} )) ),
OR( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.Routed__c}), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.Session_Id__c}), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}) ),
OR( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.OwnerId}), NOT(ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.OwnerId})) ) )

value.stringValue:
AND(
DATEVALUE([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01"),
OR( [Lead].Owner:User.Division = "MIR", [Lead].Reseller_Automation__c ),
[Lead].OwnerId <> "005b0000002iwIAAAY", /* Salesforce Admin */
[Lead].OwnerId <> "0056700000Av2XiAAJ", /* ChiliPiper Integration */
NOT(ISBLANK([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c)),
NOT(CONTAINS([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c,"Support")),
NOT(ISPICKVAL([Lead].SW_Fit_Score__c ,"")), NOT(ISPICKVAL([Lead].SW_Fit_Score__c ,"A")), NOT(ISPICKVAL([Lead].SW_Fit_Score__c ,"B")),
OR( [Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c <> [Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c, ISBLANK([Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c) ),
OR( [Lead].Routed__c, NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].LeadSource )) ),
OR( ISCHANGED([Lead].Routed__c), ISCHANGED([Lead].Session_Id__c), ISCHANGED([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c) ),
OR( ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId), NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId)) ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_7
formulas.expression:
AND(
DATEVALUE({!myVariable_current.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}) > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01"),
OR( {!myVariable_current.Owner:User.Division} = "MIR", {!myVariable_current.Reseller_Automation__c} ),
{!myVariable_current.OwnerId} <> "005b0000002iwIAAAY", /* Salesforce Admin */
{!myVariable_current.OwnerId} <> "0056700000Av2XiAAJ", /* ChiliPiper Integration */
NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c})),
NOT(CONTAINS({!myVariable_current.Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c},"Support")),
NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.SW_Fit_Score__c} ,"")), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.SW_Fit_Score__c} ,"A")), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.SW_Fit_Score__c} ,"B")),
OR( {!myVariable_current.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c} <> {!myVariable_current.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}, ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c}) ),
OR( {!myVariable_current.Routed__c}, NOT(ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.LeadSource} )) ),
OR( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Routed__c}), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Session_Id__c}), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}) ),
OR( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.OwnerId}), NOT(ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.OwnerId})) ) )

value.stringValue:
AND(
DATEVALUE([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c) > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01"),
OR( [Lead].Owner:User.Division = "MIR", [Lead].Reseller_Automation__c ),
[Lead].OwnerId <> "005b0000002iwIAAAY", /* Salesforce Admin */
[Lead].OwnerId <> "0056700000Av2XiAAJ", /* ChiliPiper Integration */
NOT(ISBLANK([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c)),
NOT(CONTAINS([Lead].Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c,"Support")),
NOT(ISPICKVAL([Lead].SW_Fit_Score__c ,"")), NOT(ISPICKVAL([Lead].SW_Fit_Score__c ,"A")), NOT(ISPICKVAL([Lead].SW_Fit_Score__c ,"B")),
OR( [Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c <> [Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c, ISBLANK([Lead].Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c) ),
OR( [Lead].Routed__c, NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].LeadSource )) ),
OR( ISCHANGED([Lead].Routed__c), ISCHANGED([Lead].Session_Id__c), ISCHANGED([Lead].Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c) ),
OR( ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId), NOT(ISCHANGED([Lead].OwnerId)) ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_7_pmetrule
formulas.expression:
AND(
DATEVALUE({!myVariable_old.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}) > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01"),
OR( {!myVariable_old.Owner:User.Division} = "MIR", {!myVariable_old.Reseller_Automation__c} ),
{!myVariable_old.OwnerId} <> "005b0000002iwIAAAY", /* Salesforce Admin */
{!myVariable_old.OwnerId} <> "0056700000Av2XiAAJ", /* ChiliPiper Integration */
NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_old.Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c})),
NOT(CONTAINS({!myVariable_old.Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c},"Support")),
NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.SW_Fit_Score__c} ,"")), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.SW_Fit_Score__c} ,"A")), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.SW_Fit_Score__c} ,"B")),
OR( {!myVariable_old.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c} <> {!myVariable_old.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}, ISBLANK({!myVariable_old.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c}) ),
OR( {!myVariable_old.Routed__c}, NOT(ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.LeadSource} )) ),
OR( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.Routed__c}), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.Session_Id__c}), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.Form_Submission_Date_and_Time__c}) ),
OR( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.OwnerId}), NOT(ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.OwnerId})) ) )
